leadoff morning note if you would like

Market risk you need to be a client of
42 macro so today's key macro question
is are asset markets correctly
interpreting Trump's choice of Scott
bessent as treasury secretary our
answers are stocks up bonds up dollar
down down gold down Bitcoin down crude
oil down and copper up is the current
interpretation of the most critical
piece of global macro news this weekend
stocks up make sense bonds up does not
make sense dollar down does not make
sense except in the context of the FED
becoming more politicized Bitcoin down
does not make sense crude oil down makes
sense and copper up makes sense all to
asset markets may be overreacting to the
bessent pick as if Scott Besson himself
was elected to the Oval Office investors
would be remiss to assume that today
kneejerk Market reactions will be
sustained over the medium to long term
while bessent May indeed represent the
best possible outcome among Trump's
short list of candidates as treasury
secretary we are not of the view that
Scott bent Elon Musk or Office of
Management and budget director nominee
Russell Vault also a fiscal Hawk will be
successful in achieving the significant
direct deficit reduction being priced
into asset markets today president Trump
won a second term of the most populous
campaign since FDR expects some
Apprentice style year five Frameworks in
the years ahead if Trump does not
receive enough support from his cabinet
for his populist agenda transitioning to
our 42 micro dashboard as always a wrap
up with a question from our community
